name: Bitter Chocolate Truffles
recipeIngredient: 400 g bitter chocolate, broken into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Makes 450g/1lb
1. In a saucepan, heat the double cream until reduced to 2 tablespoons. Remove from heat and stir in the chocolate until melted. Add the butter and stir gently. Pour onto a large flat plate. Place in the fridge for 45 minutes until chilled and set.
2. Using a teaspoon, scrape across the chocolate so it forms a rough truffle shape with large curls, not balls. Roll them in dry cocoa powder. Chill in the fridge for at least half an hour before serving.
